[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Vale''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was a member of [[Twin Suns Squadron]], and, as [[Twin Suns Two]], was [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] wingmate. However, she was not a very good pilot, being forced to return to ''[[Ralroost]]'' during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] raid on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], only surviving due to the intervention of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], whose [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] was actually more damaged. Vale was killed in the crossfire at the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9.

==Behind the scenes==
In the first half of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'', Vale is referenced as a Duros, then in the later half of that novel, she is referenced as a Neimoidian. She is also called a Neimoidian in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
